units.source_text: 滙豐利⽤結構公司將本⾝承辦的客⼾貸款證券化，以分散辦理資產的資⾦來源及提⾼資本效益。滙豐將貸款轉讓予結構公司以換取現⾦或以組合形
units.translation_target_text: HSBC uses structured companies to securitize customer loans it undertakes to diversify the funding sources of managed assets and improve capital efficiency. HSBC transfers the loan to the structured company in exchange for cash or in the form of a portfolio
units.translation_en: HSBC uses structured companies to securitize customer loans it undertakes to diversify the funding sources of managed assets and improve capital efficiency. HSBC transfers the loan to the structured company in exchange for cash or in the form of a portfolio

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC uses structured companies to securitize customer loans it undertakes to diversify the funding sources of managed assets and improve capital efficiency. HSBC transfers the loan to the structured company in exchange for cash or in the form of a portfolio

units.source_text: 式將貸款轉讓予結構公司，⽽結構公司則向投資者發⾏債務證券。當採⽤組合證券化時，與資產貸款組合相關的信貸風險透過貸款組合財務擔保轉
units.translation_target_text: The loan is transferred to the structured company, which in turn issues debt securities to investors. When portfolio securitization is used, the credit risk associated with the asset-based loan portfolio is transferred through the loan portfolio financial guarantee.
units.translation_en: The loan is transferred to the structured company, which in turn issues debt securities to investors. When portfolio securitization is used, the credit risk associated with the asset-based loan portfolio is transferred through the loan portfolio financial guarantee.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The loan is transferred to the structured company, which in turn issues debt securities to investors. When portfolio securitization is used, the credit risk associated with the asset-based loan portfolio is transferred through the loan portfolio financial guarantee.

units.source_text: 滙豐已成立多個貨幣市場及非貨幣市場基⾦。假如集團在擔任投資經理時被視作以主事⼈⽽非代理⼈⾝分⾏事，則滙豐實質上控制該等基⾦。
units.translation_target_text: HSBC has established a number of money market and non-money market funds. If the Group, in its role as investment manager, is deemed to be acting in a principal rather than an agent capacity, HSBC effectively controls the funds.

units.source_text: 滙豐於未綜合入賬結構公司之權益的最⼤損失風險承擔，指因滙豐參與未綜合入賬結構公司的活動⽽可能產⽣的最⼤損失（不論產⽣損失的可能
units.translation_target_text: HSBC’s maximum loss exposure for its interests in unconsolidated structured companies refers to the maximum loss that may arise from HSBC’s participation in the activities of unconsolidated structured companies (regardless of the possibility of loss)
units.translation_en: HSBC’s maximum loss exposure for its interests in unconsolidated structured companies refers to the maximum loss that may arise from HSBC’s participation in the activities of unconsolidated structured companies (regardless of the possibility of loss)

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 就承諾、擔保及承辦的信貸違責掉期⽽⾔，最⼤損失風險承擔為未來潛在損失的名義⾦額。
units.translation_target_text: For committed, guaranteed and undertaken credit default swaps, the maximum loss exposure is the notional amount of potential future losses.
units.translation_en: For committed, guaranteed and undertaken credit default swaps, the maximum loss exposure is the notional amount of potential future losses.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: For committed, guaranteed and undertaken credit default swaps, the maximum loss exposure is the notional amount of potential future losses.

units.source_text: 就保留及購入於未綜合入賬結構公司的投資和借予未綜合入賬結構公司的貸款⽽⾔，最⼤損失風險承擔為該等權益於資產負債表報告⽇期的權
units.translation_target_text: For investments retained and acquired in unconsolidated structured companies and loans made to unconsolidated structured companies, the maximum exposure to loss is the equity of those interests at the balance sheet reporting date.
units.translation_en: For investments retained and acquired in unconsolidated structured companies and loans made to unconsolidated structured companies, the maximum exposure to loss is the equity of those interests at the balance sheet reporting date.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: For investments retained and acquired in unconsolidated structured companies and loans made to unconsolidated structured companies, the maximum exposure to loss is the equity of those interests at the balance sheet reporting date.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 最⼤損失風險承擔的列賬⾦額未扣除滙豐為減低集團損失風險承擔⽽訂立對沖及抵押品安排的影響。
units.translation_target_text: The maximum loss exposure is presented before deducting the impact of hedging and collateral arrangements entered into by HSBC to reduce the Group's loss exposure.
units.translation_en: The maximum loss exposure is presented before deducting the impact of hedging and collateral arrangements entered into by HSBC to reduce the Group's loss exposure.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: The maximum loss exposure is presented before deducting the impact of hedging and collateral arrangements entered into by HSBC to reduce the Group's loss exposure.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 滙豐透過持有未綜合入賬證券化公司發⾏的票據⽽擁有該等公司的權益。此外，滙豐亦投資於第三⽅結構公司發⾏的資產抵押證券。
units.translation_target_text: HSBC has interests in unconsolidated securitization companies by holding notes issued by these companies. In addition, HSBC also invests in asset-backed securities issued by third-party structured companies.
units.translation_en: HSBC has interests in unconsolidated securitization companies by holding notes issued by these companies. In addition, HSBC also invests in asset-backed securities issued by third-party structured companies.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC has interests in unconsolidated securitization companies by holding notes issued by these companies. In addition, HSBC also invests in asset-backed securities issued by third-party structured companies.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

units.source_text: 滙豐成立並管理多個貨幣市場基⾦及非貨幣市場投資基⾦，為客⼾提供投資機會。有關管理基⾦的詳情載於第82⾴。
units.translation_target_text: HSBC establishes and manages a number of money market funds and non-money market investment funds to provide customers with investment opportunities. Details of the managed funds are set out on page 82.
units.translation_en: HSBC establishes and manages a number of money market funds and non-money market investment funds to provide customers with investment opportunities. Details of the managed funds are set out on page 82.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: HSBC establishes and manages a number of money market funds and non-money market investment funds to provide customers with investment opportunities. Details of the managed funds are set out on page 82.

units.source_text: 滙豐作為基⾦經理，有權根據所管理的資產收取管理費及表現費。滙豐亦可保留該等基⾦的單位。
units.translation_target_text: As a fund manager, HSBC has the right to charge management fees and performance fees based on the assets under management. HSBC may also retain units in these funds.
units.translation_en: As a fund manager, HSBC has the right to charge management fees and performance fees based on the assets under management. HSBC may also retain units in these funds.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: As a fund manager, HSBC has the right to charge management fees and performance fees based on the assets under management. HSBC may also retain units in these funds.

units.source_text: 滙豐於⽇常業務過程中成立結構公司，例如客⼾的結構性信貸交易，為公營及私營基建項⽬提供資⾦，以及進⾏資產及結構性融資交易。
units.translation_target_text: HSBC establishes structured companies in the ordinary course of business, such as structured credit transactions for customers, financing public and private infrastructure projects, and conducting asset and structured finance transactions.
